title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Aliens Group

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Aliens Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aliens Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Business Development Manager to strengthen our Ludhiana-based team.

About Aliens Group:
Aliens Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aliens Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
